input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.8.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.8.1
            TITLE: all teams must include an impact attenuator data (iad) report as part of the ses.

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.8.1: All teams must include an Impact Attenuator Data (IAD) report as part of the SES.
F.8.8.1 All teams must include an Impact Attenuator Data (IAD) report as part of the SES.

final_answer: All teams must include an Impact Attenuator Data (IAD) report as part of the SES.
